H

Hospital - Class in Model
Represents a hospital point, also used as a Voronoi site.
Hospital(int, String, double, double, int) - Constructor for class Model.Hospital
Creates a hospital with an identifier, name, position and maximum capacity.
HospitalCommands - Class in Cli
Utility class that contains command line actions related to hospitals.
HospitalZone - Class in Model
Represents a Voronoi zone associated with a hospital.
HospitalZone(List<Point>, Hospital) - Constructor for class Model.HospitalZone
Creates a hospital zone with its vertices and center hospital.
